parameters.content:
# 🚀 LinkedIn Profile Enrichment Pipeline

**What this workflow does:**
1. Reads LinkedIn profile URLs from a Google Sheet
2. Scrapes full profile data via PhantomBuster
3. Enriches company data via a second PhantomBuster agent
4. Discovers work email via Hunter.io → falls back to Dropcontact
5. Writes all enriched data back to the same Google Sheet

---
**⚡ Quick Setup (5 steps):**
1. Set up your Google Sheets credential
2. Set up your PhantomBuster credential
3. Set up your Hunter.io credential
4. Set up your Dropcontact credential
5. Fill in the **⚙️ Pipeline Configuration** node with your IDs

**📋 Sheet Requirements:**
- Sheet tab named exactly: `Leads`
- Column A must be named: `linkedin_url`
- See Setup Guide sticky note for full column list

## ⚙️ SECTION 1: TRIGGERS

**Schedule Trigger:** Runs automatically every day at 8:00 AM.
Activate this when you're ready to go to production.

**Manual Trigger:** Click 'Execute Workflow' to run immediately.
Use this for testing and one-off runs.

> 💡 Only ONE trigger should be active at a time.
> Disable the Schedule Trigger while testing.

## ⚙️ SECTION 2: CONFIGURATION

**Fill in the node to the right with your values:**

|              Field             |        |                       What to put                      |
|:------------------------------:|--------|:------------------------------------------------------:|
| GOOGLE_SHEET_ID                |        | The ID from your Google Sheet URL                      |
| PHANTOMBUSTER_PROFILE_AGENT_ID |        | Your PhantomBuster 'LinkedIn Profile Scraper' agent ID |
| PHANTOMBUSTER_COMPANY_AGENT_ID |        | Your PhantomBuster 'LinkedIn Company Scraper' agent ID |
| LINKEDIN_SESSION_COOKIE        |        | Your li_at cookie from LinkedIn                        |
| LINKEDIN_IDENTITY_ID           |        | Your PhantomBuster identity ID                         |
| USER_AGENT                     |        | Your browser's user agent string                       |
| SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL              |        | Your Slack incoming webhook URL (optional)             |

> ⚠️ **Keep your LinkedIn session cookie private.**
> Rotate it if you suspect it has been exposed.

## 📋 SECTION 3: INPUT & FILTERING

**Google Sheet tab name:** `Leads`

**Required columns in your sheet:**
- `linkedin_url` — input (Column A)
- `enrichment_status` — output (leave blank for new leads)
- `first_name`, `last_name`, `email`, `phone_numer`, `Company name`, `role`, `website`, `email_source`

**Filter logic:**
Only processes rows where:
- `linkedin_url` is NOT empty
- `enrichment_status` is empty (not yet processed)
- `first_name` is empty (not yet enriched)

**Batch size:** 5 leads per batch with a 3-second pause between batches.

> 💡 To reprocess a lead, clear Column B (enrichment_status) in the sheet.

## 👤 SECTION 4: LINKEDIN PROFILE SCRAPER

**PhantomBuster Agent:** LinkedIn Profile Scraper

This agent visits each LinkedIn profile URL and extracts:
- First name, last name
- Current job title
- Company name + LinkedIn company URL
- Location, headline

**Wait time: 60 seconds**
This gives PhantomBuster enough time to process the job in its queue. Increase to 90s if you experience timeouts on slower plans.

> 💡 You must have the LinkedIn Profile Scraper Phantom set up in your PhantomBuster account.
> Set the agent to accept a `spreadsheetUrl` argument (the profile URL).

## 🏢 SECTION 5:  COMPANY ENRICHMENT SCRAPER

**PhantomBuster Agent:** LinkedIn Company Scraper

Using the company LinkedIn URL extracted in Section 4, this agent fetches:
- Company website / domain
- Employee count
- Industry

**Wait time: 70 seconds**
Company pages may take slightly longer. Increase to 90s if needed.

> 💡 You need a separate 'LinkedIn Company Scraper' Phantom.
> It accepts a `spreadsheetUrl` argument (the company LinkedIn URL).

> ⚠️ If the profile has no linked company, this step will still run but return empty results. That's handled gracefully downstream.

## 📧 SECTION 6: EMAIL DISCOVERY

**Provider 1: Hunter.io**
Searches for a professional email using first name, last name, and company domain.
✅ On success → writes email immediately
❌ On failure → falls back to Dropcontact

**Provider 2: Dropcontact**
Full contact enrichment using LinkedIn profile data.
Dropcontact waits internally (configured for 60s).
✅ On success → writes email
❌ On failure → writes profile data without email (`Email Not Found` status)

> 💡 Hunter.io is faster and cheaper for high-volume.
> Dropcontact has better European coverage.
> You can swap providers by reordering the nodes.

## 💾 SECTION 7: OUTPUT & NOTIFICATIONS

**Two write paths:**
1. **With email found** → `enrichment_status = Enriched`
2. **Without email** → `enrichment_status = Email Not Found`
3. **Invalid URL** → `enrichment_status = Failed`

**Slack Notification:**
Fires after every completed batch with a summary.
Leave `SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL` empty in Configuration to disable.

**Wait Between Batches:**
3 seconds between each batch of 5 to respect rate limits.

> 💡 To add more output columns, modify the
> 'Write Enriched Lead' Google Sheets node
> and add the column to your sheet header row.

## 🔧 TROUBLESHOOTING

**PhantomBuster returns empty output:**
- Increase Wait node from 60s to 90s
- Check your LinkedIn session cookie is still valid
- Verify the agent is active and not paused in PhantomBuster

**Hunter returns no email:**
- Ensure the company domain was correctly extracted
- The lead's email may not be in Hunter's database

**Google Sheets fails to update:**
- Confirm sheet tab is named exactly `Leads`
- Ensure `row_number` header exists
- Confirm your Google Sheets credential has edit access

**Workflow runs but no leads processed:**
- Check column A has valid linkedin.com/in/ URLs
- Confirm `enrichment_status` column is empty for target rows

assignments.name: USER_AGENT
assignments.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

nodes.name: ⚡ Process in Batches (5 at a time)

assignments.name: error_message
assignments.value: No profile data returned from PhantomBuster. Check your LinkedIn session cookie and agent configuration.

value.row_number: ={{ $('⚡ Process in Batches (5 at a time)').item.json.row_number }}

assignments.name: company_website
assignments.value: ={{ $('📥 Fetch: Company Scraper Results').item.json.website || $('📥 Fetch: Profile Scraper Results').item.json.companyWebsite || '' }}

parameters.email: ={{ $('📥 Fetch: Profile Scraper Results').item.json.professionalEmail || $('📥 Fetch: Profile Scraper Results').item.json.firstName || '' }}{{ $('📥 Fetch: Profile Scraper Results').item.json.lastName || '' }}@{{ $('📥 Fetch: Company Scraper Results').item.json.domain || '' }}

assignments.name: company_website
assignments.value: ={{ $json.website || $('📥 Fetch: Company Scraper Results').item.json.website || $('📥 Fetch: Profile Scraper Results').item.json.companyWebsite || '' }}

assignments.name: company_name
assignments.value: ={{ $('📥 Fetch: Company Scraper Results').first().json.companyName || $('📥 Fetch: Profile Scraper Results').first().json.linkedinCompanySlug || '' }}

assignments.name: website
assignments.value: ={{ $('📥 Fetch: Company Scraper Results').item.json.website || $('📥 Fetch: Profile Scraper Results').item.json.companyWebsite || '' }}

value.row_number: ={{ $('⚡ Process in Batches (5 at a time)').item.json.row_number }}
